introSection: Mad Mouse, also referred to as Wild Mouse, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by American firm Allan Herschell Company currently located at Arnolds Park in Arnolds Park, Iowa, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened at Bell's Amusement Park in Tulsa, Oklahoma, USA in 1959. It closed in 1976 or earlier.

The ride reopened at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA in 1976. It operated through 2018.

The ride opened at Arnolds Park on July 12, 2019.

fullText:
Mad Mouse, also referred to as Wild Mouse, is a steel wild mouse roller coaster built by American firm Allan Herschell Company currently located at Arnolds Park in Arnolds Park, Iowa, USA.

The ride opened at Bell's Amusement Park in Tulsa, Oklahoma, USA in 1959. It closed in 1976 or earlier.

The ride reopened at Joyland Amusement Park in Lubbock, Texas, USA in 1976. It operated through 2018.

The ride opened at Arnolds Park on July 12, 2019.
